caption: The video features an individual standing behind a podium, delivering a speech. The person is dressed in traditional attire, consisting of a white kurta and vest, and is wearing glasses. They are gesturing with their right hand while speaking into two microphones placed on the podium. The background consists of a textured wall with a geometric pattern, and to the right, there is a decorative column with a glass enclosure containing pink flowers and a golden element. The setting appears formal, likely a conference or official event, and the speaker seems to be addressing an audience with a composed and authoritative demeanor.
